message:
Fix mutex poison recovery in load tests

The load tests use a static mutex to serialize test execution.
Previously, if any test panicked while holding the lock, the
mutex would become poisoned and all subsequent tests would fail
with "load test mutex poisoned".

Fixed by using unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner()) to recover
from the poisoned state instead of panicking. This allows
subsequent tests to run even if a prior test panicked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
